gamelift.gamesessionqueue.filterconfigur: A list of fleet locations where a game session queue can place new game sessions. You can use a filter to temporarily turn off placements for specific locations. For queues that have multi-location fleets, you can use a filter configuration allow placement with some, but not all of these locations.

gamelift.gamesessionqueue.filterconfigur.Description: A list of locations to allow game session placement in, in the form of AWS Region codes such as `us-west-2`.
